name: Playtest 11: Temp HP Gauntlet
description:
TESTS: Granting temporary HP via action effects (Armor of Agathys flat 10, False Life 1d4+4 dice roll), temp HP no-stacking rule (higher value kept, lower ignored), temp HP absorption on damage (temp HP absorbed before real HP), temp HP display in creature info panel, combined healing + temp HP in same action.

A warlock and cleric face a wave of orcs and skeletons. The warlock buffs with temp HP before enemies close in. TEST STEPS: (1) Morgana casts Armor of Agathys — verify 10 temp HP granted, shown in creature info. (2) Morgana takes damage — verify temp HP absorbed first, real HP untouched until temp HP depleted. (3) Morgana casts False Life (1d4+4) — if roll < 10, temp HP stays at current value (no-stack). If roll > remaining temp HP, replaces with new higher value. (4) Brother Aldric casts Heroism-style buff with both healing and temp HP — verify both apply. (5) Multiple enemies attack Morgana — verify temp HP depletes correctly across multiple hits.
